summary: The user expressed feelings of loneliness after their best friend moved away and sought suggestions for meeting new people. They decided to join a hiking group or club to connect with others who share their interest in hiking and planned to use Meetup.com and ask coworkers for recommendations.
facts: The user has been feeling lonely since their best friend moved to a new city for work a few weeks ago. The user is interested in joining a hiking group or club to meet new people who share their interest in outdoor activities. The user plans to try out Meetup.com to search for hiking groups in their area. The user intends to ask their coworkers for recommendations on good hiking spots or groups. The user hopes to find a group of friends or a hiking buddy to share experiences and provide accountability for getting out on the trails more often.
